name: Chili-Beef-Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a saucepan and drain off any excess fat.
2. Add onion and celery to the pan, stirring until they are tender-crisp.
3. Stir in tomatoes, potatoes, beef broth, water, chili powder, salt, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Cover and cook for about 15 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
5. Stir in peas or green beans and heat through.
